aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Progress HVAC due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, making them less visible in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with question-answer pairs

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and potential customers.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP citations are consistent and accurate across all platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content makes the site less AI-friendly.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Durham, NC
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications and expertise through structured data and content

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility for your HVAC business.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Progress HVAC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The Google Business Profile is not found, and there is no schema markup on the website.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to avoid losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Progress HVAC - Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical gaps in AI optimization that are impacting your visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search.
business_name: Progress Heating and Air Conditioning, LLC.
page_title: Heating | Air Conditioning Service & Repair Durham NC - Progress HVAC
